Physics

  • Physics Reference
  • Physics: Equations
  • $$ \frac{n_{z+1}, n_e}{n_z}
  • $$ \varepsilon_{ki}(\lambda)
  • $$ \gamma_{\text{Stark}}(n_e, T)
  • $$ V(\lambda; \sigma, \gamma)
  • $$ I_{\text{measured}}(\lambda)
  • $$ I_{ki}
  • $$ \underbrace{\ln!\left(\frac{I_{ki}, \lambda_{ki}}{g_k, A_{ki}}\right)}_{y}
  • $$ S(T, n_e)
  • $$ C_{s\text{-oxide}}
  • $$ \tau_0
  • \frac{\pi e^2}{m_e c}, f_{ki}, n_i, L, \frac{1}{\Delta\nu_D}, \qquad \frac{I_{\text{obs}}}{I_{\text{thin}}}
  • $$ \ln p(\mathbf{I}_{\text{obs}} \mid T, n_e, \mathbf{C})

CF-LIBS

Reference

Module-level reference for CF-LIBS: API call signatures, codebase architecture, and atomic database internals.

Document

Use it for

API_Reference.md

Module-by-module API: function signatures, class methods, parameter descriptions.

Codebase_Architecture.md

Source-tree map, design patterns, data-flow diagrams, JAX integration.

Database_Generation.md

Building/extending the SQLite atomic database from NIST data.

For the physics the API computes, see ../physics/. For user-level workflows that drive the API, see ../user/.
